name: @open-horizon/marvin-client
description: Shared Amazing Marvin limited-token client for Obsidian and MCP adapters

scripts.build: npm run clean && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.cjs && tsc --project tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly
